title: Assistant Project Manager (Work From Home)
required_skills: Experience with project management tools (Asana, ClickUp, Notion, Monday.com)
matched_skills: Technology operations and tech stack lifecycle management (direct match to 'skilled in apps and technology')
Vendor and partner management (direct match to Client and Vendor Management responsibility)
C-level reporting and data storytelling (matches Reports Generation and Documentation)
KPI framework design and performance reporting (matches Data Collection and Analysis)
Agile sprint planning and delivery / Scrum (matches Process Optimization and PM tools usage)
Programme Governance and PMO Operations (matches organized and detail-oriented requirement)
missing_skills: Explicit naming of specific PM tools (Asana, ClickUp, Notion, Monday.com) — Boru's CV does not name these tools directly
No demonstrated 'assistant-level' scoping — all CV experience is mid/senior coordination or PMO
key_requirements: Proficiency with modern project management software (Asana, ClickUp, Notion, Monday.com or equivalents)
Client and vendor coordination across business units
Report generation, documentation, and data analysis
core_responsibilities: B2B communication and stakeholder coordination across client organizations
Client and vendor management on behalf of tech startup clients
cv_highlights: PMO at HSBC managing USD 8M programme with C-suite reporting — demonstrates senior-level governance and communication
Project Coordination at Hapag-Lloyd with Agile/Scrum delivery and KPI tracking — directly maps to PM tools and process optimization
Business Development at ECE Group: project reporting and vendor coordination — maps to vendor management and documentation
Power BI certified — supports data collection and analysis requirement
Multilingual (English, German, Chinese, Cantonese) — adds value for global startup clients
gaps: Role is 'assistant' level — significantly below Boru's 4+ years of PMO and senior project coordination experience; likely to be perceived as overqualified
Compensation is likely USD-based global talent arbitrage pricing, not competitive for Germany cost-of-living
No explicit mention of Asana, ClickUp, Notion, or Monday.com in CV — this is a minor gap since PM tool proficiency is implied
Persona is a staffing agency, not a direct employer — less stable career trajectory and limited branding benefit
recommended_emphasis: Explicitly name PM tools used (even if implied) — add Notion, Jira, or similar to CV skills if accurate
Frame Hapag-Lloyd and HSBC experience around 'supporting and coordinating' alongside leadership to avoid appearing overqualified
Highlight remote-work experience and async communication capability
Emphasize data analysis and reporting outputs (Power BI, KPI dashboards) as concrete deliverables
Lead with cross-functional coordination and vendor management rather than governance/programme oversight
recommendation: Weak fit — skills align well technically (score 72), but the role is assistant-level at a staffing agency with likely below-Germany-market compensation. Boru is overqualified in seniority. Only worth pursuing if Boru explicitly wants remote entry-level re-entry or a side engagement; otherwise deprioritize in favor of direct-employer PMO or Project Manager roles.
